## Research Summary

### Entity Confirmed
**INDO GLOBAL RESOURCES FZCO / DMCC** — Registration **DMCC190978**. Unit 2402, Saba Tower 1, JLT, Dubai. Active DMCC-licensed paper and pulp trading company, part of the 35-year-old Indo Global Commercials group (India).

> **Name note:** All public databases (Panjiva, ImportGenius) list this as "DMCC" not "FZCO" — this is a naming convention difference, not a separate entity. The subject brief's "FZCO" designates the legal entity form within DMCC.

---

|---|---|---|

| **Sanctions (OFAC/UN/EU/UK)** | ✅ NO HITS | Entity and UBO both clean |
| **PEP Check** | ✅ NO PEP | Private sector paper trading executive |

| **DIFC Courts** | ✅ NO CASES | No litigation found |

| **Iran evasion** | ✅ NONE DETECTED | Non-strategic commodity; no RAK FZ; no recent incorporation |

### Trade Records (ImportGenius)
- **15 US customs shipments** confirmed (2024–2025)
- Products: Standard Newsprint, Bleached Softwood Pulp
- Key buyers: Graphic Communication Group (USA), Spento Papers India (USA), Premier Tissues India (USA), Logic Paper (Peru)
- Most recent: March 2025 — Bleached Softwood Pulp → Premier Tissues, Newark NJ

### ⚠️ One Informational Note
The parent company website lists Russia among sourcing countries. No Russian-origin goods confirmed in reviewed shipments (one BoL shows Canadian origin). For **EU-destined transactions only**, standard practice is to request certificate of origin to confirm non-Russian origin compliance with EU 2022 paper pulp sanctions.

### Risk: **2 – CLEAR**
All primary compliance checks passed. Legitimate, active, transparent DMCC entity with fully identified UBO, 35-year group heritage, active FSC-certified trade records, and no adverse findings.
